message:
test(frankenterm-core): add 10 DEC Special Graphics charset conformance fixtures

Box-drawing (top/bottom edges, tees), symbol chars (diamond, checker,
degree, plus-minus), math symbols (≤≥π≠£·), charset switch to ASCII,
full reset clears charset, soft reset clears charset, passthrough for
unmapped characters, combined with SGR bold attributes.

New charset/ directory with 10 fixtures exercising ESC ( 0 / ESC ( B
and translate_charset() recently wired into the conformance harness.

Total VT conformance fixtures: 234

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+{
+  "name": "charset_switch_back_to_ascii",
+  "description": "ESC ( B switches back to ASCII after DEC Special Graphics",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b28306c711b28426c71",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 4
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "\u250c"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "\u2500"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "l"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "q"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+{
+  "name": "dec_graphics_box_bottom",
+  "description": "DEC Special Graphics charset draws box-drawing bottom: mqqqj -> \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b28306d7171716a",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 5
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "\u2514"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "\u2500"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "\u2500"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "\u2500"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 4,
+        "char": "\u2518"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+{

+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b28306c7171716b",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {

+    },

+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "\u250c"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "\u2500"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "\u2500"
+      },
+      {

+}

@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+{
+  "name": "dec_graphics_passthrough",
+  "description": "Characters outside DEC Graphics range (A-Z, 0-9) pass through unchanged",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b2830414243313233",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 6
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "B"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "C"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "1"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 4,
+        "char": "2"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 5,
+        "char": "3"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+{
+  "name": "dec_graphics_symbols",
+  "description": "DEC Special Graphics symbol characters: diamond, checker, degree, plus-minus",
+  "initial_size": [

+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b283060616667",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 4
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "\u25c6"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "\u2592"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "\u00b0"
+      },
+      {

+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "\u00b1"

+    ]

+}

@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+{
+  "name": "soft_reset_clears_charset",
+  "description": "DECSTR (CSI ! p) resets charset back to ASCII, preserves screen content",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b28306c1b5b21706c",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 2
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "\u250c"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "l"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}
